subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Grasp thou the firm handle and hold fast to the mighty cord of the Lord of Grandeur. That firm handle [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله تمسک بعروه وثقی جو و تشبث بحبل متین حضرت کبریاء آن عروه محکم و
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
